Attacks.Name: Bite
Attacks.Effect: If a wild is rolled during this attack, the target character gains the Stun special condition.

Attacks.Name: Poison Fang
Attacks.Effect: If a wild is rolled during this attack, the target character is given the Poison special condition.

Attacks.Name: Pursuit
Attacks.Effect: If the target character is moving or has moved this round, add 2 dice to this attack roll.

Superpowers.Name: Gluttony
Superpowers.Effect: When this character removes damage or a special condition from itself, it gains 1 power.

Superpowers.Name: Poison Touch
Superpowers.Effect: When this character hits with a melee attack, if a wild is rolled, the target also gains the Poison special condition.

Attacks.Name: Crunch
Attacks.Effect: If a wild is rolled during this attack, reduce the target character's Defense by 1 until the end of their next activation.

Superpowers.Name: Knock Off
Superpowers.Effect: Choose an enemy character within range. That character loses 2 power.

Superpowers.Name: Evolution
Superpowers.Effect: Replace this character with an Alolan Muk character of the same injured status. The new character begins with damage equal to the damage on this character and power equal to the power on this character.
